description_long: This is a tall, insulated travel cup with a matte black exterior and a metallic silver base and rim. The cup has a slightly tapered cylindrical shape, widening towards the top, and features a fitted lid with a central drinking opening. The body appears to be made of stainless steel, likely double-walled for thermal insulation, and is coated with a dark, non-reflective finish. A subtle embossed logo or emblem is visible on one side of the cup, adding a touch of branding without being overly conspicuous. The lid is flush with the rim and seems to be made of a different material, possibly plastic or metal, designed for secure closure. This cup is typical of those used for carrying hot or cold beverages in urban environments, such as on commutes or in parks.
description: A matte black, insulated travel cup with a metallic base and rim, featuring a fitted lid and subtle embossed logo. The cup is tall, slightly tapered, and designed for carrying beverages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the matte black body, metallic base, and a visible embossed logo near the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view with the matte black surface and metallic base, logo not visible, lid and rim clearly defined.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted matte black surface and metallic base, no logo or markings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with the matte black body and metallic base, no visible logo.
